info.description: API for simpo pharmacy management system supporting POS, inventory, reporting, and multi-branch operations.
info.title: simpo Pharmacy Management System API

post.description:
Deletes audit logs older than 5 years with optional backup (Story 6.4, AC6)
CRITICAL: This operation permanently deletes audit logs. Use with caution.

get.description: Returns information about audit logs eligible for cleanup (Story 6.4, AC6)
Returns list of all available backups with metadata (Story 6.3, AC5)

post.description: Manually triggers a database backup operation (Story 6.3, AC5)
Manually triggers cleanup of backups older than retention period (Story 6.3, AC3)

get.description: Returns current backup configuration (Story 6.3, AC8)
Returns current backup job status and statistics (Story 6.3, AC4)
Downloads the specified backup file (Story 6.3, AC5)

delete.description: Manually deletes the specified backup file (Story 6.3, Task 4)

post.description: Restores database from the specified backup file (Story 6.3, AC6)

get.description: Validates the specified backup file for restoration (Story 6.3, AC6)

post.description: Creates a new pharmacy branch with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)

put.description: Updates a branch's information with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)

delete.description: Deactivates a pharmacy branch with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)

get.description: Returns current health alerts grouped by severity (Story 6.2, Task 3)
Returns system health metrics for admin dashboard (Story 6.2, AC1-7)
Returns historical health metrics data (Story 6.2, Task 3 - optional)
Get paginated list of all users with optional filtering (requires admin role)

parameters.description: Sort by field (created_at, updated_at, name, email)
parameters.name: sort

200.description: Success response with paginated user list

post.description:
Grants a specific permission to a user with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)
Note: Current implementation uses RBAC with pre-defined roles. This endpoint
is provided for future PBAC (Permission-Based Access Control) enhancement.

501.description: Not Implemented - RBAC system in use

delete.description:
Revokes a specific permission from a user with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)
Note: Current implementation uses RBAC with pre-defined roles. This endpoint
is provided for future PBAC (Permission-Based Access Control) enhancement.

501.description: Not Implemented - RBAC system in use

put.description: Updates a user's role with audit logging (Story 6.4, AC1, AC2)

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns access and refresh tokens

200.description: Success response with user data and tokens

500.description: Failed to authenticate user or generate token

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's information with roles

200.description: Success response with current user data

post.description: Exchange refresh token for new access and refresh tokens with automatic rotation

200.description: Success response with new token pair

403.description: Token reuse detected - all tokens revoked

post.description: Register a new user with name, email and password, returns access and refresh tokens

200.description: Success response with user data and tokens

500.description: Failed to register user or generate token

post.description: Self-registration for staff with whitelisted email domains (Public endpoint)
post.summary: Register a new staff member via self-registration

post.description: Verify email verification token and activate user account (Public endpoint)

get.description: Check if the application is running and its dependencies (Story 9.1 - API versioned endpoint)

200.description: System is healthy - all critical dependencies connected

503.description: System is unhealthy - critical dependency disconnected

get.description: Get products with search, filters, and pagination. Owners can filter by branch/category. Cashiers see only their branch.
Retrieves products expiring within specified days threshold (7, 14, or 30). Supports optional branch_id filtering for Owners, Cashiers see their assigned branch only.

parameters.description: Filter by branch ID (Owner only, defaults to user's branch)
parameters.name: branch_id

200.description: Success response with expiring products list

get.description: Retrieves products where current stock is below reorder threshold. Supports optional branch_id filtering for Owners, Cashiers see their assigned branch only.

parameters.description: Filter by branch ID (Owner only, defaults to user's branch)
parameters.name: branch_id

200.description: Success response with low stock products list

get.description: Retrieves a product by SKU. Used for barcode scanning in POS. Returns error if product is expired.

post.description: Adjust stock quantity with reason logging for inventory corrections. Admin/Owner only.

get.description: WebSocket endpoint for receiving real-time stock updates. JWT token required via query parameter.

parameters.description: Comma-separated branch IDs to filter (Owner only, defaults to user's branch)
parameters.name: branches

get.description: Retrieve all pharmacy system settings (business name, address, phone, email). Requires System Admin role.

put.description: Update pharmacy system settings (business name, address, phone, email). Requires System Admin role. Changes are logged to audit trail.

get.description: Retrieve public pharmacy settings (business name, address, phone, email) for receipts and reports. No authentication required.

post.description: Create a new user with role assignment. Only users with SYSTEM_ADMIN role can access this endpoint.

400.description: Invalid request or validation error (missing fields, invalid format, invalid role, missing branch_id for CASHIER)

409.description: Conflict - username or email already exists

get.description: Get a user by their ID (requires authentication)

200.description: Success response with updated user data

400.description: Invalid user ID or Validation error

delete.description: Delete a user by ID (requires authentication)

put.description: Deactivate a user account (SYSTEM_ADMIN only). Requires reason field.

400.description: Cannot deactivate own account or invalid reason

get.description: Retrieve all email domains in the whitelist (SYSTEM_ADMIN only)

post.description: Add a new email domain to the whitelist for staff self-registration (SYSTEM_ADMIN only)

get.description: Retrieve a specific whitelist entry by ID (SYSTEM_ADMIN only)

put.description: Update a whitelist entry's default role and/or description (SYSTEM_ADMIN only)

delete.description: Remove a domain from the whitelist (SYSTEM_ADMIN only)

get.description: Check if the database connection is healthy (Story 2.4)
Check if the application is alive (not deadlocked)
Check if the application and its dependencies are ready to serve traffic

total_requests.description: Total request count for rate calculation

instance.description: URI reference identifying this specific occurrence

confirmed.description:
Confirmed must be true to execute the cleanup (safety confirmation)
Example: true

create_backup.description:
CreateBackup indicates whether to create a backup before cleanup
Example: true

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for performing cleanup (minimum 10 characters, maximum 500)
Example: "Scheduled quarterly cleanup per compliance policy"
Code review fix: CRIT-015 - Add max length validation
reason.example: Scheduled quarterly cleanup per compliance policy

backup_file.description:
BackupFile is the backup file created (if CreateBackup was true)
Example: "audit_backup_20260527.csv"

deleted_count.description:
DeletedCount is the number of audit log entries deleted
Example: 5000

executed_at.description:
ExecutedAt is the timestamp when cleanup was executed
Example: "2026-05-27T15:00:00Z"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason provided for the cleanup
Example: "Scheduled quarterly cleanup per compliance policy"
reason.example: Scheduled quarterly cleanup per compliance policy

email.description:
Email is the branch email
Example: "jakarta@simpo.pharmacy"

location.description:
Location is the branch address
Example: "Jl. Sudirman No. 123, Jakarta Pusat"

name.description:
Name is the branch name (unique, maximum 100 characters)
Example: "Jakarta Central"

phone.description:
Phone is the branch phone number
Example: "+62-21-1234-5678"

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the timestamp when branch was created
Example: "2026-05-27T12:00:00Z"

email.description:
Email is the branch email
Example: "jakarta@simpo.pharmacy"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the created branch
Example: 5

location.description:
Location is the branch address
Example: "Jl. Sudirman No. 123, Jakarta Pusat"

name.description:
Name is the branch name
Example: "Jakarta Central"

phone.description:
Phone is the branch phone number
Example: "+62-21-1234-5678"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for deactivation (minimum 5 characters)
Examples: "Branch closed permanently", "Relocated to new address", "Temporary closure for renovation"

deactivated_at.description:
DeactivatedAt is the timestamp when branch was deactivated
Example: "2026-05-27T14:00:00Z"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the deactivated branch
Example: 5

name.description:
Name is the branch name
Example: "Jakarta Central"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for deactivation
Example: "Branch closed permanently"

cutoff_date.description:
CutoffDate is the date before which logs are eligible for cleanup
Example: "2021-05-27T00:00:00Z"

eligible_for_cleanup.description: EligibleForCleanup is the number of logs older than 5 years

estimated_space_reclaimed.description:
EstimatedSpaceReclaimed is the estimated disk space that would be reclaimed (in bytes)
Example: 52428800

total_logs.description: TotalLogs is the total number of audit logs in the system

email.description:
Email is the new branch email
Example: "jakarta-central@simpo.pharmacy"

location.description:
Location is the new branch address
Example: "Jl. Sudirman No. 456, Jakarta Pusat"

name.description:
Name is the new branch name
Example: "Jakarta Central Branch"

phone.description:
Phone is the new branch phone number
Example: "+62-21-9876-5432"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for the update (minimum 5 characters, maximum 500)
Example: "Address correction, phone number updated"
Code review fix: CRIT-015 - Add max length validation

changes.description:
Changes is a summary of what was changed
Example: "Name: Jakarta Central → Jakarta Central Branch, Location updated"
changes.example: Name: Jakarta Central → Jakarta Central Branch, Location updated

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the branch
Example: 5

name.description:
Name is the updated branch name
Example: "Jakarta Central Branch"

updated_at.description:
UpdatedAt is the timestamp when branch was updated
Example: "2026-05-27T12:30:00Z"

branch_id.description:
BranchID is the branch assignment (required for CASHIER role, optional for others)
Must reference an existing branch ID
Example: 1

email.description:
Email is the user's email address (valid format, must be unique)
Example: "cashier@example.com"

password.description:
Password is the user's password (minimum 8 characters, will be hashed with bcrypt)
Example: "SecurePass123!"

role.description:
Role is the user's role (must be one of: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER)
Example: "CASHIER"
Enum: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER

username.description:
Username is the login username (minimum 3 characters, must be unique)
Example: "newcashier"

branch_id.description:
BranchID is the branch assignment (null for SYSTEM_ADMIN and OWNER roles)
Example: 1

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the timestamp when the user was created (ISO 8601 format)
Example: "2026-05-11T22:00:00Z"

email.description:
Email is the user's email address
Example: "cashier@example.com"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the created user
Example: 5

role.description:
Role is the assigned user role
Example: "CASHIER"

status.description:
Status is the user account status (always "ACTIVE" for newly created users)
Example: "ACTIVE"

username.description:
Username is the login username
Example: "newcashier"

reason.description:
Reason is the deactivation reason (minimum 5 characters)
Examples: "Staff resignation", "Termination", "Contract ended"

deactivated_at.description:
DeactivatedAt is the timestamp when the user was deactivated
Example: "2026-05-12T11:45:00Z"

deactivated_by.description:
DeactivatedBy is the admin user ID who performed deactivation
Example: 1

deactivation_reason.description:
DeactivationReason is the reason for deactivation
Example: "Staff resignation"

email.description:
Email is the user's email address
Example: "formerstaff@simpo.pharmacy"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the deactivated user
Example: 10

status.description:
Status is the user account status (will be "INACTIVE" after deactivation)
Example: "INACTIVE"

username.description:
Username is the login username
Example: "formerstaff"

permission.description:
Permission is the permission to grant
Examples: "MANAGE_USERS", "MANAGE_INVENTORY", "VIEW_REPORTS"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for granting permission (minimum 5 characters)
Example: "Additional responsibilities for new project"

granted_at.description:
GrantedAt is the timestamp when permission was granted
Example: "2026-05-27T12:00:00Z"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the user
Example: 10

permission.description:
Permission is the granted permission
Example: "MANAGE_USERS"

username.description:
Username is the login username
Example: "staffuser"

permission.description:
Permission is the permission to revoke
Examples: "MANAGE_USERS", "MANAGE_INVENTORY", "VIEW_REPORTS"

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for revoking permission (minimum 5 characters)
Example: "Project completed, no longer needs access"
reason.example: Project completed, no longer needs access

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the user
Example: 10

permission.description:
Permission is the revoked permission
Example: "MANAGE_USERS"

revoked_at.description:
RevokedAt is the timestamp when permission was revoked
Example: "2026-05-27T12:00:00Z"

username.description:
Username is the login username
Example: "staffuser"

email.description: Email is the user's email address (valid format, must be unique)

full_name.description: FullName is the user's full name

password.description: Password is the user's password (minimum 8 characters, will be hashed with bcrypt)

username.description: Username is the login username (minimum 3 characters, must be unique)

created_at.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the user was created

email.description: Email is the user's email address

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the created user

role.description: Role is the assigned user role

status.description: Status is the user account status (PENDING for self-registered users)

verification_sent.description: VerificationSent indicates whether email verification was sent

reason.description:
Reason is the reason for role change (minimum 5 characters)
Examples: "Promoted to owner", "Role change due to reorganization", "Demoted for policy violation"

role.description:
Role is the new role to assign (must be one of: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER)
Example: "OWNER"
Enum: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the user
Example: 10

new_role.description:
NewRole is the new role after change
Example: "OWNER"

old_role.description:
OldRole is the previous role before change
Example: "CASHIER"

updated_at.description:
UpdatedAt is the timestamp when role was changed
Example: "2026-05-27T12:00:00Z"

username.description:
Username is the login username
Example: "staffuser"

role.description: Story 6.4: Added Role field for role updates

token.description: Token is the email verification token

default_role.description:
DefaultRole is the default role assigned to users registering with this domain
Required: true
Enum: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER
Example: "CASHIER"

description.description:
Description is an optional description of the whitelist entry
Required: false
Example: "Simpo Pharmacy staff domain"

domain.description:
Domain is the email domain to whitelist (e.g., "simpo.pharmacy")
Required: true
Example: "simpo.pharmacy"

default_role.description:
DefaultRole is the default role assigned to users registering with this domain
Required: false (updates only provided field)
Enum: SYSTEM_ADMIN, OWNER, CASHIER
Example: "OWNER"

description.description:
Description is an optional description of the whitelist entry
Required: false
Example: "Updated description"

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the timestamp when the entry was created
Example: "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z"

default_role.description:
DefaultRole is the default role for this domain
Example: "CASHIER"

description.description:
Description is the description of the whitelist entry
Example: "Simpo Pharmacy staff domain"

domain.description:
Domain is the whitelisted email domain
Example: "simpo.pharmacy"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the whitelist entry
Example: 1

updated_at.description:
UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the entry was last updated
Example: "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z"

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
